scanType: Focused scan: Crypto market conditions (fundraising and DeFi environment)
summary: BTC at $66,246 (-3.85% 24h), ETH at $1,985 (-4.05%). Total crypto market $2.37T (-3.1%). Fear & Greed Index at 12 (EXTREME FEAR). Trading volume $107B. BTC dominance 56.1%.

Iran war is the primary driver: since Feb 28 strikes, Iran conflict has overridden every crypto rally. 89% BTC-S&P500 correlation, 95% BTC-gold correlation during March 19 selloff. Crypto is trading as a risk asset correlated with macro.

Oil is the transmission mechanism: Brent went from $81.40 to $106.41 (30.72% increase) in first 3 weeks of March. Strait of Hormuz effectively closed. Oil above $100 keeps inflation elevated, Fed cannot cut rates, money moves away from risk assets.
$1B+ in crypto liquidations over 24 hours on one Trump Iran post. 85% hit long positions. BTC swung from $68K to $71K and back on ceasefire headlines. Extreme headline sensitivity.

Despite crypto price weakness, prediction market volume is AT ALL-TIME HIGHS ($21B+ monthly). This is the key decoupling: prediction market demand is driven by uncertainty, not by BTC price. LEVER's thesis does NOT depend on a crypto bull market.

fundingImplications.shortTerm: Extreme fear + declining prices = tougher fundraising environment for typical crypto projects. VCs may be more cautious on timing.
fundingImplications.leverSpecific: LEVER has a COUNTER-CYCLICAL argument: prediction market volume is at ATH despite crypto downturn. Uncertainty DRIVES demand for prediction markets. LEVER is not betting on BTC price going up; it is betting on the world being uncertain. That is a much stronger thesis in a risk-off environment.
fundingImplications.baseChainImpact: ETH at ~$2K means Base TVL may compress in USD terms (though not necessarily in token terms). Morpho and Aerodrome still functional. DeFi infrastructure unaffected by price.
fundingImplications.timing: Counterintuitively, a fear environment may be GOOD for LEVER's fundraising pitch: 'Even in a crypto bear market, prediction market volume is $21B+ because geopolitical uncertainty is structural. LEVER is infrastructure for uncertainty, not speculation on crypto prices.'

workstreamTags.CEO: Market is in extreme fear (index at 12). BUT: this is actually GOOD for LEVER's pitch. Prediction market volume is at $21B+ ATH while BTC is down. The decoupling is the story: LEVER does not need a bull market. It needs an uncertain world. We have that in abundance. Lead with this in investor conversations: 'Our TAM grows with uncertainty, not with BTC price.'
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: Crypto bear market with prediction market bull market = unique positioning opportunity. LEVER should lean into the counter-cyclical narrative. Most DeFi projects struggle to pitch during fear markets. LEVER thrives because its demand driver (geopolitical uncertainty) is the same thing causing the fear.
workstreamTags.BUILD: ETH at $1,985 does not affect Base smart contract functionality. Gas costs actually decrease in bear markets. Good environment for deploying and testing without cost pressure.
